'''Jasod Revoc''' was a famous [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] actor who was very popular during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he was given top billing by [[HoloNet Entertainment]] at shows set up to entertain [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] troops and personnel, due to the fact that he was younger than fellow HoloNet star [[Epoh Trebor]].

At one point, Revoc's Galactic Revue featured acts such as [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]], who eventually struck out on their own as musicians.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1stm}}
